_note: Search criteria driven into bus_generate.py. Each entry runs run_search() once; results are merged + de-duped by phone across all queries. Edit freely — add/remove cities or price bands. Most fields map 1:1 to run_search() params in scripts/search.py; `min_plausible_price` is a bus-only data-cleaning floor (see _min_plausible_note).
_min_plausible_note: Listings priced below `min_plausible_price` are dropped as dirty (placeholder/电议 prices like $100, or per-room prices from 分租 mislabeled as 整租). Set per the bedroom count — a real 2br whole-unit rent in metro Vancouver is never under ~$1000. Falls back to the top-level default if omitted.
_fresh_days_note: A listing is flagged new:true if its own post/update date is within `fresh_days` days — NOT by when we first saw it. Lower = stricter 'just listed'.
_sanity_min_ratio_note: Silent-failure guard: if a run yields fewer than this fraction of the PREVIOUS run's listing count (or zero), bus_generate.py aborts without overwriting bus/data.json and exits non-zero, so a site breakage turns the Actions job red instead of publishing an empty snapshot.
_ignored_note: Listings the user said they are NOT interested in live in config/ignored.json; bus_generate.py drops any current listing whose id/phone matches before writing bus/data.json. Add entries with scripts/ignore.py.
